case_title: POSTEL, FREDERICK vs. LEONARDI, IGOR et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF POSTEL, FREDERICK AS TO DEFENDANT LEONARDI, IGOR FLETCHER, JAMIE JONES, JERRY DUNMORE, DEBBORREH HOAR, ROBERT DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

#7 BENSON/BAUER: C/C FOR CT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT W/ ATTY K HUYSENTRUYT. DEFT D DUNMORE NOT PRESENT. DEFTS J FLETCHER & J JONES HAVE BEEN DEFAULTED. ORAL & WRITTEN TESTIMONY. JDMT BY COURT FOR PLTF AGAINST DEFTS. EXH'S RET'D TO PLTF. PLTF PREPARE JDMT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLETCHER, JAMIE JONES, JERRY DUNMORE, DEBBORREH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 954 OAK $10,579.81 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,579.81, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL.
